operator_contract.rule: Run preview commands first; run apply commands only after the named human, platform, URL, secret, or metric input is complete.

current_next_actions: Next operational action: Post YouTube Community manual cards

30-day growth goal: Publish or approve the next platform-native rows, then refresh manual/public metrics to rank formats by results.

Then preview import with python3 scripts/update_experiment_results.py --from-wide-csv data/experiment_result_entry_wide_template.csv --dry-run after filling data/experiment_result_entry_wide_template.csv.

Re-check checked-pending store links: 7 music site snapshot(s) still have no public URL; next recommended re-check after 2026-06-23T09:35:42.451328+00:00. Run python3 scripts/verify_pending_store_links.py --refresh-admin --step-timeout-seconds 25 then.
